caption: A man wearing a white dress shirt, a red bow tie, beige suspenders, and a tall, grey, stylized wig sits in a studio setting. He wears glasses and black headphones, speaking into a black microphone positioned in front of him. Behind him is a wall decorated with various framed photographs and clothing items, including a yellow garment with the word "LEE" visible. A logo on the screen features the text "BOSS TALK JOY" and "PODCAST," with a small graphic to the left. As the sequence progresses, the man talks and gestures with his right hand, which is raised in the first frame and lowers as he continues speaking through the subsequent frames. His facial expression remains focused as he addresses someone off-camera, while the background and equipment remain stationary throughout the clip.
